zh.lifeSummary: William De Carent是John De Carent的兒子，於1312年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特斯圖爾明斯特 牛頓。他於1338年4月與Johanna De Tryl在英國英格蘭多瑟特武德藍茲結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1346年12月28日在他的家鄉享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Carent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Normand, Fernand, Pierre, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Gilles, Laurent, Alain, Chanel, Donat.
French and Walloon: from Old French parent ‘father’, a relationship name used to differentiate a father and son with the same personal name.
English: nickname from Middle English parent ‘parent, ancestor, relative’ (Old French parent, Latin parens).

variants.name: Parenteau
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Normand, Camille, Cecile, Florent, Paul Emile, Pierre, Yvan, Aime, Armand, Aurel.
History: Pierre Parenteau dit Lafontaine from Bazauges in Charente-Maritime, France, married Madeleine Tisserand in Quebec City, QC, in 1673.

variants.name: Chouinard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Pierre, Yvon, Adelard, Camille, Emile, Fernand, Jacques, Lucien.
French: nickname from a diminutive of cho(u)e ‘jackdaw’ + the pejorative suffix -ard. Compare Sweeney and Swenor .

History: Jacques Chouinard from Beaumont-la-Ronce in Indre-et-Loire, France, married Louise Jean in Quebec City, QC, in 1692. His descendants also bear altered forms of the surname, such as Sweeney and Swe(e)nor, and also the surname Parent .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: William De Carent was born in 1312, in Sturminster Newton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom as the son of John De Carent. He married Johanna De Tryl in April 1338, in Woodlands, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 28 December 1346, in his hometown, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: William De Carent est né en 1312, à Sturminster Newton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de John De Carent. Il a épousé Johanna De Tryl en avril 1338, à Woodlands, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Lui sposato Johanna De Tryl nel aprile 1338, nel Woodlands, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: William De Carentは1312年にイギリスイギリスドールセトストゥルミンスター ニュートンでJohn De Carentの息子として生まれた。1338年4月にイギリスイギリスドールセトウッドランズでJohanna De Trylと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1346年12月28日に故郷で34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Carent(은)는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 스투르민스터 뉴턴에서 John De Carent의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1338년 4월 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 우들랜드즈에서 Johanna De Tryl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1346년 12월 28일 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: William De Carent родился в 1312 г. в местности стурминстир нютон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали John De Carent. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna De Tryl апрель 1338 г. в местности вудландс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 28 декабря 1346 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет.
